description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical black kettle with a wide, slightly flared rim and a matching base. The surface appears matte with subtle wear marks, giving it a utilitarian, industrial look. A single, ornate side-mounted handle is attached, featuring a curled design that provides a secure grip. The kettle lacks a visible spout and lid, making it appear more like a traditional water pail or a minimalist urban vessel. The interior is hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold liquids. The overall construction looks robust, likely made from metal, suitable for heavy-duty urban or outdoor use.
description: A tall, black, cylindrical kettle with a wide rim and a single ornate side handle, featuring a matte, worn surface and no visible spout or lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, open top and cylindrical body with no handle or spout visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the ornate, curled side-mounted handle attached to the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the handle and the continuous cylindrical form.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the handle fully visible, highlighting its curled design.
